nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Miombo wren-warbler
nodes.summary: The miombo wren-warbler (Calamonastes undosus), also known as the miombo barred warbler or pale wren-warbler, is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae found in southern Africa. Some authorities have also included Stierling's wren-warbler in this species. Diet It is an insectivore. References

nodes.name: 安东·赖歇诺
nodes.summary: 安东·赖歇诺是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联27种鸟类，包括索马里鸵鸟、Striped flufftail、烏干達點啄木等27种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。
